bank: If review contains specific room or hotel feature details matching known hotel info, then truthful
If review contains generic phrases with no unique details, then deceptive
If review shows mixed positive and negative sentiments, then truthful
If review contains exaggerated extremely positive or negative language without nuance, then deceptive
If temporal references (dates, seasons) are consistent and plausible, then truthful
If temporal information is missing or contradicts hotel open times, then deceptive
If review contains contradictions or inconsistent statements about the hotel, then deceptive
If review narrative is coherent and logically structured, then truthful
If review uses repetitive phrases or unnatural language patterns, then deceptive
If reviewer account posts multiple reviews in short timespan, then deceptive
If review mentions staff names or specific employee interactions consistent with hotel practices, then truthful
If review uses generic superlatives without supporting details, then deceptive
If review describes sensory experiences consistent with hotel environment, then truthful
If review avoids any personal experience indicators, then deceptive
If review references local landmarks or neighborhood context accurately, then truthful
